testcase.name: test_trigger_now_no_datetime_errors

failure.message: AssertionError: Should include message assert 'message' in {'current_hour': 13, 'results': [{'player': 'TG_7438800063...', 'reason': 'Outside window (23:00-5:00, current: 13:00)', 'status': 'skipped'}, {'player': '0xC7383aBDaF7507C4a2...', 'reason': 'Outside window (3:00-9:00, current: 13:00)', 'status': 'skipped'}, {'player': '0x9c8Ae7C9C9ec1Cef31...', 'reason': 'At treat limit (7/7 in window, 0 remaining)', 'status': 'skipped'}, {'player': '0x513a246b4d10f20b6D...', 'reason': 'Outside window (0:00-6:00, current: 13:00)', 'status': 'skipped'}], 'total_active_subs': 4, 'triggered_at': '2026-03-02T13:15:12.880223+00:00'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auto_mixer_subscription_expiry.py:238: in test_trigger_now_no_datetime_errors assert "message" in data, "Should include message" E AssertionError: Should include message E assert 'message' in {'current_hour': 13, 'results': [{'player': 'TG_7438800063...', 'reason': 'Outside window (23:00-5:00, current: 13:00)', 'status': 'skipped'}, {'player': '0xC7383aBDaF7507C4a2...', 'reason': 'Outside window (3:00-9:00, current: 13:00)', 'status': 'skipped'}, {'player': '0x9c8Ae7C9C9ec1Cef31...', 'reason': 'At treat limit (7/7 in window, 0 remaining)', 'status': 'skipped'}, {'player': '0x513a246b4d10f20b6D...', 'reason': 'Outside window (0:00-6:00, current: 13:00)', 'status': 'skipped'}], 'total_active_subs': 4, 'triggered_at': '2026-03-02T13:15:12.880223+00:00'}
